description.short: Foundry agent package for engineering design presentations.
description.full: Limited Teams package for Engineering Design PPT. Routes directly through Azure API Management without Bot Service.

commands.title: Ask Eng Design PPT
commands.description: Ask a question about engineering design presentations

samplePrompts.text: In engineering_design_review_001.pptx, summarize the problem statement, project goal, and design scope described in the openi...
What system components, layers, or services are shown in solution_architecture_update_002.pptx?
Which interfaces, data flows, or external integrations are called out between components in the architecture update deck?
What alternative design options or solution approaches are compared in engineering_design_review_001.pptx?
What trade-offs or decision criteria are used to justify the preferred design in the engineering presentations?

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.title: Question
parameters.description: Your question about engineering design presentations
